headline: POOL Q1 Deep Dive: Installed Base Anchors Growth Amid Measured Discretionary Demand
summary: Swimming pool distributor Pool (NASDAQ:POOL) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 6.2% year on year to $1.14 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.46 per share was 7.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
